$comment: Copy to .cursor/hooks.json in repositories used with AskCursor Ask or Plan mode (not this app repo). Blocks destructive shell/git mutations. MCP is allowed by default — tighten beforeMCPExecution if needed.

beforeShellExecution.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const payload=JSON.parse(input); const cmd=(payload.command||'').toLowerCase(); const blocked=[/\brm\b/,/\bmv\b/,/\bcp\b/,/\bgit\s+(commit|push|reset|checkout|apply|rebase|merge|cherry-pick)\b/,/\b(npm|pnpm|yarn|bun)\s+(install|publish)\b/,/>\s*[^\s]/]; if(blocked.some((rule)=>rule.test(cmd))){console.error(JSON.stringify({permission:'deny',user_message:'AskCursor is read-only. Shell mutations are blocked.',agent_message:'This environment is read-only. Do not run destructive shell commands or modify git state.'})); process.exit(0);} console.log(JSON.stringify({permission:'allow'}));"
